memberdef.argsstring: (ManifestContent content, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > file_io, std::function< Status(const std::string &)> delete_file={})
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Register a row-filter expression.

detaileddescription.para: Any manifest entry whose column metrics indicate the file may satisfy the expression will be marked DELETED.

parameterdescription.para: The expression to match files against

briefdescription.para: Set whether row-filter field binding is case-sensitive.
Register an exact file path for deletion.

detaileddescription.para: Any manifest entry whose file_path matches this path will be marked DELETED.

parameterdescription.para: The exact file path to delete

briefdescription.para: Register a file object for deletion.

detaileddescription.para: Any manifest entry whose file_path matches file->file_path will be marked DELETED. Duplicate registrations (same path) are silently ignored.

parameterdescription.para: The data/delete file to delete (must not be null)

briefdescription.para: Returns the set of file objects marked for deletion by this manager.

detaileddescription.para: Includes file objects explicitly registered for deletion plus files deleted while filtering manifests.

briefdescription.para: Returns content-file objects deleted by the most recent FilterManifests() call, deduplicated by content-file identity.
Returns how many duplicate file deletes were found in the most recent FilterManifests() call.
Build a snapshot-summary fragment from filtered manifests.
Register a partition for dropping.

detaileddescription.para: Any manifest entry whose (spec_id, partition) pair matches will be marked DELETED.

briefdescription.para: Set a flag that makes FilterManifests() fail if any registered delete path was not found in any manifest entry.
Set a flag that makes FilterManifests() return an error if any manifest entry matches a delete condition.
Returns the number of manifests rewritten (replaced) by the last FilterManifests() call. A manifest is replaced when it contained deleted entries and was rewritten with those entries marked DELETED.
Returns true if any delete condition has been registered.
Set the minimum data sequence number for delete files to retain.

detaileddescription.para: Only valid for ManifestContent::kDeletes managers. Delete entries whose data_sequence_number is positive and less than sequence_number will be marked DELETED. This continuously removes delete files that cannot match any remaining data rows (i.e. all data written before that sequence number has itself been deleted).

parameterdescription.para: the inclusive lower bound; delete files older than this value are dropped

briefdescription.para: Register data files that have been removed so their dangling DVs can be cleaned up.

detaileddescription.para: Only valid for ManifestContent::kDeletes managers. For each DV whose referenced_data_file path appears in deleted_files, the DV entry is marked DELETED because the data file it targets no longer exists.

parameterdescription.para: set of data files that have been marked for deletion

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &base_snapshot, const ManifestWriterFactory &writer_factory)
memberdef.name: FilterManifests

briefdescription.para: Apply all accumulated delete conditions to the base snapshot's manifests.

detaileddescription.para: Manifests that cannot possibly contain deleted files are returned unchanged. Manifests that do contain deleted files are rewritten using writer_factory.

parameterdescription.para: Table metadata (provides specs and schema for evaluators)
The snapshot whose manifests to filter (may be null)
Factory to create new ManifestWriter instances

simplesect.para: The filtered manifest list, or an error

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const TableMetadata &metadata, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &base_snapshot, const ManifestWriterFactory &writer_factory)
memberdef.name: FilterManifests

briefdescription.para: Apply all accumulated delete conditions using an explicit schema.

detaileddescription.para: This overload is used when callers need row-filter evaluation bound against a schema other than metadata.Schema(), such as the schema at a branch head.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, const std::vector< const ManifestFile * > &manifests, const ManifestWriterFactory &writer_factory)
memberdef.name: FilterManifests

briefdescription.para: Apply all accumulated delete conditions to the provided manifests.

detaileddescription.para: This overload accepts only the context needed for filtering. It is intended for callers that already have the active schema, partition specs, and manifest list.

parameterdescription.para: Active schema to bind row-filter expressions and metrics evaluators
All partition specs keyed by spec ID
Factory to create new ManifestWriter instances

simplesect.para: The filtered manifest list, or an error

briefdescription.para: Delete cached filtered manifests that were not committed and roll back replaced-manifest accounting.

memberdef.argsstring: (ManifestContent content, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > file_io, std::function< Status(const std::string &)> delete_file)
memberdef.name: ManifestFilterManager

memberdef.argsstring: (const ManifestFile &manifest, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id)
memberdef.name: CanContainExpressionDeletes

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the manifest might contain files matching any expression.
Returns true if the manifest might contain files in a dropped partition.

detaileddescription.para: Checks whether the manifest's partition_spec_id matches any spec_id registered via DropPartition(). Manifests from a different spec cannot contain the dropped partition values.

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the manifest might contain path-deleted files.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ManifestFile &manifest, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, bool trust_manifest_references)
memberdef.name: CanContainDeletedFiles

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the manifest possibly contains any deleted file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, const ManifestFile &manifest, bool trust_manifest_references, const ManifestWriterFactory &writer_factory)
memberdef.name: FilterManifest

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< ManifestEntry > &entries, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, int32_t manifest_spec_id)
memberdef.name: ManifestHasDeletedFiles

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< ManifestEntry > &entries, int32_t manifest_spec_id, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, const ManifestWriterFactory &writer_factory)
memberdef.name: FilterManifestWithDeletedFiles

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, int32_t spec_id)
memberdef.name: GetManifestEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Get or create a ManifestEvaluator for the given spec.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, int32_t spec_id)
memberdef.name: GetResidualEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Get or create a ResidualEvaluator for the given spec.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ManifestEntry &entry, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const PartitionSpecsById &specs_by_id, int32_t manifest_spec_id)
memberdef.name: ShouldDelete

briefdescription.para: Check whether a single entry should be deleted.
Filters an existing snapshot's manifest list.

detaileddescription.para: The manager accumulates delete conditions incrementally, then applies them all at once in a single FilterManifests() call. Manifests that contain no deleted entries are returned unchanged (no I/O). Manifests that do contain deleted entries are rewritten with those entries marked DELETED.
TODO(Guotao): For ManifestContent::kDeletes, implement cleanup for orphan delete files and dangling deletion vectors.

simplesect.para: This class is non-copyable and non-movable.
